perturbation.original_text: CONSULTANT warrants and represents that CONSULTANT has bound its employees, agents and subcontractors to the terms and conditions of this Agreement or that each and every employee, agent or subcontractor has personally executed a Non-Disclosure Agreement containing terms and conditions no less stringent than the terms and conditions contained herein; and furthermore CONSULTANT hereby agrees to indemnify, hold harmless and defend NYNEX from and against any loss, cost, damage, expense or claim arising out of any breach of this provision or the failure of CONSULTANT or its employees, agents or subcontractors to protect such Confidential Information.
perturbation.changed_text: CONSULTANT warrants and represents that CONSULTANT has bound its employees, agents and subcontractors to the terms and conditions of this Agreement. CONSULTANT hereby agrees to indemnify, hold harmless and defend NYNEX from and against any loss, cost, damage, expense or claim arising out of any breach of this provision or the failure of CONSULTANT or its employees, agents or subcontractors to protect such Confidential Information.
perturbation.explanation: By removing a portion of the Consultant's representation regarding subcontractors, this reduces the obligation to protect the information as it relates to third parties. A material element of the provision is removed.
perturbation.law_explanation: Section 5.03 of the Restatement (Second) of Agency discusses the duty of care an agent (Consultant) owes to the principal (NYNEX). By removing the warranty relating to subcontractors/agents adhering to similar NDA terms, this weakens NYNEX's recourse if a subcontractor breaches confidentiality, conflicting with the agent's broader duty of care to ensure the principal's interests are protected, including safeguarding confidential information through subcontractors.

perturbation.justification: The original contract text explicitly states that the consultant warrants that its employees, agents, AND subcontractors are bound to the terms or that each has executed an NDA. The changed text removes the phrase 'or that each and every employee, agent or subcontractor has personally executed a Non-Disclosure Agreement containing terms and conditions no less stringent than the terms and conditions contained herein'. This removal weakens the protection of confidential information regarding subcontractors. The Law Explanation states that this change 'weakens NYNEX's recourse if a subcontractor breaches confidentiality'. The Perturbation Explanation states that 'a material element of the provision is removed'. Therefore, removing a key element of the consultant's warranty regarding subcontractors creates a structural flaw that could lead to a legal contradiction. The available scraped snippets do not directly address this contradiction, but the explanations provided support the assessment that a contradiction exists.
